articles.title: A Review of Graph Neural Networks: Concepts, Architectures, Techniques, Challenges, Datasets, Applications, and Future Directions
articles.keywords: GNN; deep learning; NLP; text classification; sentiment analysis; social networks; fMRI
articles.abstract: Deep learning has seen significant growth and is now applied to graphs. This comprehensive review covers GNN concepts, architectures (GCN, GAT, GraphSAGE, GIN), training techniques, and open challenges. Applications span NLP (text sentiment analysis, text classification, question generation), social network analysis, biochemistry, and neuroscience (fMRI classification for major depressive disorder). Benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics are summarized. Future directions include scalable GNNs, dynamic graphs, heterogeneous graphs, and integration with LLMs for end-to-end NLP pipelines.
